meaning: n.[常用作总称]室内地面,地板,地板材料,铺地板
examples: Quarry tiles are a popular kitchen flooring.
The client's choice of flooring is also pre-installed on top.
In Aisle 34 is precut plastic flooring, the glue already in place.
Five fire appliances and two water carriers remain at Bathgate Flooring on the Rotherwas Industrial estate.
Brick walls and exposed flooring trusses give this trendy TriBeCa eatery a warm atmosphere.
